storyInfo: Yun Qingping learns that the one who 'invited' him to Mt. Mang is currently atop the mountain proper. While climbing, he helps rescue a wandering lady's husband from a game of weiqi. Only then does he learn that the game has been ongoing for many years, waiting for someone who could resolve it.

attributes.content: When are you going to be finished, mister?
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: No rush, let me think a little longer.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: But you've been thinking for half a day now. Last time I came by, you were thinking, and the time before that too. Were you tricked by someone?
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: I've been here lots of times now, and I've never actually seen anyone play weiqi with you.
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: You're not wrong. I'm just... thinking about how I should proceed.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: You need to consider how your opponent will react after you place a stone, and all the changes that will arise after.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: Sounds like a pain. Just thinking about it makes my head hurt... Can't you finish this game first, then ask the one you're playing with to teach you later?
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: It's just weiqi, nothing's going to happen if you lose.
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: But I cannot lose.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: The one who arranged this game promised me that, if I win, he shall grant me a wish.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: A wish? Really?
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: *sigh* Shame I don't get any of this strategic thinking. I think I'm more suited for physical stuff...
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: The sun's about to set, so I should get home. There's still a pile of junk I need to sort out.
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: Zaijian!
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: Oh, right, I just thought of something. We've seen each other lots of times now, but I still don't know your name, mister.
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: My surname is Lan, while my name is Ke. 'Lan' of the orchid flower, and 'Ke' of possibility.
attributes.name: Quiet Weiqi Player

attributes.content: You do remember my name, right, mister?
attributes.name: Unruly Child

attributes.content: Luo Qin?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: That's right!
attributes.name: Little Luo

attributes.content: I really gotta go now. Mother said we need to move out of the house for a bit. When I'm back, I'll definitely come to see you again.
attributes.name: Little Luo

attributes.content: Zaijian!
attributes.name: Little Luo

attributes.content: The sound of the boy's footsteps slowly fades away. Night falls upon the weiqi board. Sunlight falls upon the stones. Rain and snow wash the stone benches.
Lan Ke picks up a white stone. He nearly places it down, but retracts his hand. Half a day later, he finally throws the stone back into its bowl.
His tenth dead end. He keeps it clear in his memory.
Time for yet another round of calculation. This time, he must come up with some wondrous move or the other to triumph.
We have arrived, Mr. Yun.
attributes.name: Courteous Gentleman

attributes.content: Did you not say earlier that the one who awaited me was atop the mountain?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: 'Tis true, 'tis true. That person is atop the mountain, indeed, but my duty is merely to show you the path leading up to it.
attributes.name: Courteous Gentleman

attributes.content: There is only one path going up the mountain, but it is not hard to walk. The forest around it has been cleared, so you should not run into any wild beasts.
attributes.name: Courteous Gentleman

attributes.content: You need only head up. The rest has been arranged for you.
attributes.name: Courteous Gentleman

attributes.content: I suppose it would be rude if I inquire too deeply...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Then let us say our goodbyes here.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: May we meet again, Mr. Yun.
attributes.name: Courteous Gentleman

attributes.content: You say that, but...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I don't think I actually see a path up the mountain here...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The ground is completely covered in leaves. I doubt anyone has come this way in a very long time.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Not even signs of any beast trails...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Perhaps I should find a local to ask for help.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Good day?
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: Good day, my lady. Is something the matter?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: May I ask if you have seen my husband?
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: He is young, with hair of brown and a tail point of pure white. He is wearing a cloud-white tunic, trousers the color of earth, and leather boots.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: I... don't think I've seen anyone who matches that description. My apologies.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Is that so? Pardon me for wasting your time.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: Hold on, madam!
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Do you happen to be from these parts? I wanted to ask if there was a path up the mountain nearby.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: You wish to ascend? Then I fear you've gone the wrong way.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: The regular path up the mountain is on the other side of town. This is the back of the mountain, which is rugged and steep. The townsfolk rarely ever come this way.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: (The back of the mountain? I distinctly remember coming straight from the town's main road. How did I end up on the back?)
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I see now. Duoxie, madam.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: But I believe... since the gentleman guiding me told me specifically to come this way, he must have considered all this. I will continue trying.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Please, excuse me.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I shall accompany you up the mount, sir.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: I'm sure there's no need—
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The road up the mountain is dangerous. If we are together, we can look out for each other.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: Besides, I have already made inquiries everywhere I could in town. The mountain is the last place I have yet to search. If my husband is still in the area, the only place he can be is here.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: Then, I shall have to thank you again.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: May I ask how I should call you?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: ...Bai Jin.
attributes.name: Hesitant Girl

attributes.content: Still stuck on that board, Brother Lan?
attributes.name: Luo Qin

attributes.content: I'm hardly in a hurry.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: You've been at it for so long, I've learned how to play myself.
attributes.name: Luo Qin

attributes.content: This situation on the board, isn't it a 'three jie cycle'? They call it a 'triple ko' in Higashi. Shouldn't it be a draw according to the rules?
attributes.name: Luo Qin

attributes.content: A draw... A draw is unacceptable.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: The rules were very clear. Only through a win will he grant my wish...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: No, I need to find a way to victory...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: What's this wish you want so bad that you need to win this game? Isn't there another way you can make it happen?
attributes.name: Luo Qin

attributes.content: Another way... What other way...?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: There is no other way for two as separate as yin and yang to meet again...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: O miserable fate... From where do you flow?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Will this do, Jin'er?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: It's beautiful! You really are skilled, my dear.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: And here I was, thinking your ability to bake porcelain only applied to weiqi pieces.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: Heheh, I can do a lot more than that. Next time, whatever you fancy, whatever you like, I'll be happy to bake it for you.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Once we are wed, I'll put this vase in the most conspicuous spot in the living room.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: 'Vase in the east, mirror in the west, enjoy lifelong tranquility and rest'... We're still missing a mirror, then. But if we place one, we won't have anywhere for the clock. Well, the bell in town rings in the morning and the night, it'll do.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: In time, there shall be flowers in the vase, and you in the mirror's shine.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Oh, that's enough out of you. We don't have much fuel left, so head out to the back of the mountain to chop a few logs while it's still light out.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: Alright, just sit tight, then. I'll be right back.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: I will. Dinner should be about ready when you get back.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: What the... What's going on...?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Where did these monsters come from?!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Jin'er———!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: So there was... a path here... all along.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Do you... need a hand... Madam Bai?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: You do not need to concern yourself about me, Mr. Yun.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: I grew up amongst the mounts and fields. This is but a leisurely stroll to me.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: You, on the other hand, look rather pale. Would you like to rest a moment?
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: I shall... take you up... on your offer.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Hoo... Hah...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Your dedication is much like my husband's.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: He sounds like a very conscientious man.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: He is.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: He approaches everything with absolute focus. It is rare for anyone's urgings to have any effect.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: He will stay in one place without food, water or moving until he is done. *sigh* He really does inspire both pity and frustration.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: At least he listens when I speak, so it's always me who has to pull him away by the ear. That's how it's always been since we were little.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: But there was a gentleman who played weiqi in town who said this temperament was suited for the game.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: With a few years of study, he could become a master, perhaps even a grandmaster. If he does, he can leave town and head off to distant lands to look around.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: Your husband left to study weiqi?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Yes. He has been studying for a very long time now.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: He throws his all into his studies and barely listens to what anyone has to say. It's simply too much, I tell you.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: Haha... I have also heard about the endless marvels of black against white upon the gridded board, and how captivating they can be.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The land is vast, and there are many things that can trap a man in a mire. Even a memory can leave one pacing back and forth for quite some time.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Your husband must have his reasons for his dedication.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Why exactly are you trying to argue his case?
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: I was simply moved by his tale.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Well... You said your husband disappeared, but when exactly was this disappearance?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: He...
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: It was nearly nightfall, and he went out to the mountain to chop some firewood. I never heard from him after that.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: That truly is worrying.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Let us set off then, Madam Bai.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Do you not wish to sit a little longer? Pardon me for saying so, but your body does not seem the strongest, nor do you look accustomed to steep mountain paths.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: While I might not be able to perform martial arts, I practice breathing techniques every day.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The path is yet long, so I must be diligent.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I see an ancient pavilion further up. We can rest again once we arrive there.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The game's still stuck in a stalemate, huh... He's been thinking about his next move for ages now...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Just how long have you been working on this one move, Brother Lan?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: I don't know.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: My grandson's now as tall as I was back then.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: He didn't believe me at all when I told him about you. 'Who would spend their entire life on a single lousy game?', he said.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Do you still remember when exactly you got separated from Sister Bai?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: I don't.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: After I left town, I got lost and was disheartened. I wandered the mountain for several months before arriving here. It can't have been that long.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: And what day was that?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: There are some things I don't remember all that clearly.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Then do you know today's date?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: But that's not important. Let us speak of other things once I solve this deadlock.
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Oh, everyone in town's been so in a tizzy over some treasure or the other that I never expected someone to come over here.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Here to see the game as well, youngster?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: We're just here to take a rest—
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: 'We'? But it's just you.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Just me? The lady I was climbing the mountain with...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Strange... She was here just a moment ago...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Yun Qingping looks all around him, but there is no sight of the woman.
There is only a young man, sitting at a weiqi board in silence.
And this gentleman is...?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: *sigh* He's trapped in that game. There's no getting him out of it.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: If you know how to play, help him out a bit.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: This game state...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: A three jie cycle. A prolonged battle that can only end in a draw.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: But he's dead set on victory, so in the end, he trapped himself here.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: I can't think of a way to get him out...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: (Observes the board)
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: (Contemplates)
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: H-Heaven above, it's trapped another.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: One after another, *sigh*...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: A refusal to draw, victory the only satisfactory option...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: If one focuses only on the jie, can one truly demonstrate superiority on the battlefield?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: This boy... He yet lives.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: But with such grievous wounds, he will have to endure many hardships.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: I can't practice kung fu with this body of mine, so what use is there in me recording all the many styles under Heaven?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I don't understand, Grandmaster...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Yun, have you ever questioned the Grandmaster's plans for you?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Of course I have. When I first took this job, my heart still harbored some resentment. I felt like making me watch everyone practice kung fu every day was like chaining me atop a stake while dangling meat before my eyes.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The scent hits you like a fist, your eyes go wide with greed, but you can never have even half a bite. I tormented myself with an endless barrage of complaints as I suffered in discontent.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: You don't look like you're suffering now.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Even though my progress is only theoretical, it is enough to soothe me.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: But more importantly, I believe I understand some of the reasoning behind it.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Have I told you about my recent dreams, Zuo?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: No, might as well tell me now.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: One night, I dreamed that I would return to the countryside someday, a nameless, obscure man. All those many martial moves and techniques, when used upon the fields, will let you save a considerable amount of strength in tilling and hoeing the land.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Another night, I was a passionate warrior, quick to kindness and vengeance, an imitator of the Grandmaster. Strike, and sunder the tides cleft. Retract, and leave no peace bereft. A legend born from a single punch, before dying after all my breath is spent.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: They both sound really different from the Yun I know...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Obsession is a quagmire. It is natural for those trapped within to not understand.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: After much deliberation, there is but only one answer...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: First give, then observe, and finally, take.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The stone should go here.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Yun Qingping picks up a white stone, paying no heed to the massive hundred-point battle raging on the board as he nonchalantly places it on the other side of the board.
Black takes the opportunity to wipe out the majority of white stones atop the board, but then comes a stunning reversal, leaving white with a clear advantage.
Lan Ke watches in stunned silence as the countless stones, both black and white, disappear as if they were but mirages. All that is left is a clear board, and three men surrounding it.
The stalemate has been broken.
My word... To think there was a move like that!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Duoxie, my friend, duoxie! I couldn't come up with anything despite thinking for so long. I never expected you to break it open the moment you arrived. You have my admiration!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: You flatter me. I don't actually know much about weiqi. I simply thought that, since all things on this land are connected, martial doctrines that espouse give and take could be applied to weiqi as well. I didn't think it would work out so well.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Your weiqi skills far exceed mine, but since you were so focused on winning the jie cycle, you overlooked the overall state of the board.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: No matter how you put it, this game is won!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Is that you... Luo Qin?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: I'm Luo Qin's grandson.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: When he was still alive, he'd always talk about the strange man back home playing weiqi atop the mountain. I've visited you many times, thinking I'd have to pass this task on to my own grandson. Didn't think this man'd put a stop to it all, youngster.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: That means I've spent...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Over a hundred years here. The town's changed too.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: So I've been... separated from Jin'er... for all these years...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: My dear.
Jin'er?!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Yes, it's me.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: Long time no see... dear.
attributes.name: Bai Jin

attributes.content: It's really you! That Xian wasn't lying to me! I really did meet you again!
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Amazing... Truly incredible...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Let's go home right away! Mom and Dad are still waiting for us—
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: Jin'er...? Why won't you... say anything...?
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: I see... Hahaha.... So that's how it is...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: I was already... long ago...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: But it doesn't matter. I got to... see you again...
attributes.name: Lan Ke

attributes.content: With the game ended, the Xian keeps his promise.
And so, Lan Ke is free of his regrets.
Madam Bai...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: No, you are not the Madam Bai of this tale.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Yes. After seeing my love, what more have I to pine for?
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: I was but a stack of joss papers before her cenotaph, soaked in his tears and longing.
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: Her desires, my destiny, were bound together in this meeting with him.
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: With him gone, there is no reason for me to stay here.
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: I beg the two of you, fulfill my final request. Place my love's grave by her cenotaph, then burn 'me' as an offering.
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: We may not have been able to grow old together in this life, but I hope that in the next... we will meet again...
attributes.name: 'Bai Jin'

attributes.content: 'Madam Bai' falls silent, then bows deeply. And in an instant—
There is only a stack of joss papers, fluttering in the wind.
Joss paper... So this particular Bai Jin was a geist?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: A hundred and twenty years ago, for reasons unknown, a horde of geists fell upon the town one night, wantonly lashing out at anyone and everyone. Truly a calamity.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: My granddad was saved by the young man named Lan Ke.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: He helped many townspeople escape with their lives that night... but he himself had to be saved from the flood of geists by Bai Jin.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: As for her... She died that night.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Mr. Lan and Madam Bai were kind people...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I heard those geists are born from thoughts. Once those obsessions are gone, they go back to being regular objects.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: The secret passed down my family for three generations has finally borne fruit, so why do my tears refuse to stop...
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: I'm heading down the mountain, youngster. I need to make sure Sister Bai's request gets done, and also tell my granddad about what happened.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: How about you?
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: There's someone I'm meeting on the mountain. I need to get going.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: This mountain's so lively nowadays. No idea what kind of bigshot asked you to climb up the back side to meet up.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Well, I'll be off then.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: If, by any chance, we meet again, you're welcome at mine for a cup of tea.
attributes.name: Old Luo

attributes.content: Old Luo carefully packs up the things on the ground, putting them in his basket before tottering down the mountain.
Was it you who broke the stalemate?
May I inquire as to who is speaking?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: A half-life who deals with menial tasks, a hard-working geist is all.
You are Da—Chongyue's record-keeping man, the one by his side.
I presume you are one of the Sui proxies, then.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Forgive me for inviting you in such a matter. Let us ascend. There is a guest at the peak awaiting you.
So I was 'invited'...?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Indeed. At first, it was for other matters... but who could have expected you to chance upon that game and break the deadlock with a flick of your wrist?
(Loudly) You were right again! You happy, you weiqi failure?!
It was pure happenstance. Did someone really predict that would happen?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: When the second brother left this board here, he proclaimed that only a man with true intelligence could resolve it.
Now that I think about it, him arranging this board here... The closest to 'human' of us siblings is the eldest brother, and calling one of his disciples over... Hardly an odd move.
Let us climb.
Remember to take the board with you. The game is over, so it's yours now.
Very well...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I do not know what to call you.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Just the one character, Liang, 'Liang' of the roof beam.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Mr. Liang, you said that only the Grandmaster's students could break this deadlock just now, but the game already had a player before I came here.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: You mean that Lan Ke?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He really did make a promise at the time, which kept Lan Ke playing.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: It was a game where the more obsessed you were with the jie, the less able you were to resolve it. He knew full well that a weiqi player would be mesmerized by them, yet still allowed him to join...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: It could be said that the one who arranged this game simply wished to play, or perhaps...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: The one who uses weiqi as a means to meet, has a heart as stubborn as this eternal deadlock?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Ah, a fine way of looking at it. Yes, very fine indeed.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Barely-controlled vibrating)
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Please, go ahead and tell it to his face next time.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: We have arrived.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: This is the one who wished to meet you.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I suppose it is fate that determined we should meet again.
attributes.name: Clever Girl

attributes.content: It is a pleasure to see you again, Mr. Yun.
attributes.name: Clever Girl
